function.name: download_doc
function.description: Download a document from the SPK documentation server. Accepts a full URL or a filename relative to the doc base URL. Text files are returned as content; images are saved and must be read with read_artifact.

url.description: Full URL or filename relative to doc base URL.

function.name: list_artifacts
function.description: List all files currently saved in the artifacts directory.

function.name: read_artifact
function.description: Read an artifact file. Text files return content; images are described using vision AI.

filename.description: Name of the file in the artifacts directory.

function.name: submit_final_answer
function.description: Submit the completed SPK declaration to the Hub API for verification.
